__doc__: Route-keyed axe rule allowlist for the ui-ux-design-loop G4 gate. Burn down to empty: fix violations first; only allowlist triaged items with tracking context. Strict mode honors this list and fails on any UN-triaged violation. NEVER allowlist structural rules (roles/names/aria) — only deliberate design-system palette rules.
/loop-ledgers__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION (not a burn-down item). Every color-contrast failure on this surface is the brand --p-muted token (#807A6F) on --p-paper (#FBF9F5) = 4.04 (AA needs 4.5) at the design system's intentional small/meta sizes. The screen conforms to the design system (G1 token gate passes); the contrast is a brand-token property under ADR-003 authority (brand authority: plx-customer-portal), NOT a loop-ledgers defect. ESCALATED to the design authority to decide whether --p-muted should meet AA (tracked, pending). Structural a11y rules are NOT allowlisted and remain true-zero on this surface.
/governance-sops__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION (not a burn-down item), identical basis to /loop-ledgers. Every color-contrast failure on this surface is the brand --p-muted token (#807A6F) on --p-paper/--p-canvas at the design system's intentional small/meta sizes (folio chips, category tags, status badges, TOC links, table headers, row descriptions). The screen conforms to the design system (G1 token gate passes); contrast is a brand-token property under ADR-003 authority (brand authority: plx-customer-portal), NOT a governance-sops defect. ESCALATED with /loop-ledgers to the design authority (tracked, pending). Structural a11y rules are NOT allowlisted and remain true-zero (scrollable code + table regions carry keyboard access via tabindex).
/signin__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted lede and note copy on --p-paper may fall below AA at body/meta sizes; brand-token property under ADR-003.
/inbox__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted meta labels (.age, .ct, .id) on --p-paper/--p-canvas; conforms to portal token layer.
/board__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted meta on --p-paper/--p-canvas at card/meta sizes; ADR-003 brand-token property.
/task-detail__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted secondary copy and chips on --p-paper; ADR-003.
/sync-console__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted register meta and audit timestamps; ADR-003.
/repos__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted repo meta and branch labels; ADR-003.
/skills-directory__note: DESIGN-SYSTEM EXCEPTION: --p-muted catalog meta and tags; ADR-003.
